name: Fetch
description: HTTP client with SSRF protection, response size limits, and Readability-style HTML extraction.

tools.name: fetch
tools.description: Send any HTTP request and return status, headers, body, final URL, redirect chain, and protocol version. SSRF guard blocks private/loopback/link-local/metadata IPs by default.

tools.name: fetch_json
tools.description: GET/POST a URL and return parsed JSON. Sets Accept: application/json automatically. If the body isn't valid JSON, data.json is null and data.body holds the raw text.

tools.name: fetch_html
tools.description: Fetch an HTML page and extract its main content as Markdown. Returns title, byline, excerpt, lang, markdown, word_count. Set extract='raw' to return the full HTML, or extract='text' for plain text.

tools.name: download
tools.description: Download a file into ~/Downloads. Filename must be a plain name (no path separators, no '..', no leading '.' or '~'). Resolved path is verified to stay under ~/Downloads.

skills.name: osaurus-fetch
skills.description: Teaches the agent how to use the HTTP fetch tools — JSON APIs, Readability HTML extraction, file downloads, with built-in SSRF and size limits.
